rationale: e-0062/a-0060 found the granularity signal is concentrated on the hard tail (rho=0.52 with difficulty; 321/633 wide targets in the top difficulty tertile, largest delta). A difficulty-pooled paired McNemar test then under-weights its strongest stratum. Whether a difficulty-stratified design is strictly more powered -- and whether the top-tertile cell alone clears the e-0045 D>=6 / e-0060 break-even -- is a separable, CPU-answerable power question that operationalizes the prescription.
